name: Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Project 1)
description: Mark submits a vehicle spec (make, model, year, etc.) via a HubSpot form and automatically receives a formatted Excel file showing what DFC stocks for those vehicles and what's missing from inventory.

name: Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2)
description: Automatically enriches the weekly backorder report with live inventory status (on hand, on order, in transit), flags dead-end parts with no source, and generates draft customer communications — replacing the current process of a dozen people doing independent lookups.

name: Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder
description: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to compile a make/model/year reference sheet for two-piece rotors, cross-references against DFC's existing parts, and runs automated customer outreach to gather demand data — all feeding into one formatted output for Dino.
